title: Fractions of a Group
essential_question: How can a fraction name part of a group?
strategies: numerator = items that match the description

pretest.question: There are 6 balloons. 2 are red. What fraction of the balloons are red?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: There are 8 marbles. 3 are blue. What fraction of the marbles are blue?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: There are 4 apples. All 4 are green. What fraction of the apples are green?
pretest.explanation: All 4 out of 4 = 4/4 = the whole group.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: A bag has 6 counters: 1 red, 2 blue, 3 yellow. What fraction of the counters are yellow?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340

learn.title: Fraction of a Group
learn.content: A fraction can name part of a group, not just part of a shape. The denominator is the total number of items. The numerator is how many items match. Example: 3 out of 5 fish are goldfish → 3/5 of the fish are goldfish.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Finding the Numerator
learn.content: Count how many items match the description. If there are 8 stickers and 5 are stars, the numerator for 'star stickers' is 5 → 5/8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Part NOT Described
learn.content: To find the fraction that is NOT the described part, subtract the numerator from the denominator. 5/8 are stars → 8 − 5 = 3 are not stars → 3/8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분모 = 그룹 전체 개수
learn.content: 그룹의 분수 a/b에서 분모 b는 전체 물건 개수. 예: 8개 사탕 중 3개가 빨강 → 빨강 분수 = 3/8 (분모는 항상 8). 흔한 실수 (M04): 빨강이 3개니까 '3/3'이라고 적음 — 전체 개수(8)를 잊음. 항상 '전체가 몇 개?' 먼저 묻기.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 부분의 합 = 1 (전체)
learn.content: 그룹의 모든 부분 분수를 더하면 1이 됨. 예: 6개 구슬 = 빨강 2/6 + 파랑 1/6 + 노랑 3/6 = 6/6 = 1. 🔍 검산: 모든 색의 분수를 더해 b/b가 나오면 정답. 다르면 어딘가 빠뜨림.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 그룹 분수 3단계 루틴
learn.content: 그룹의 분수를 적을 때 3단계:   단계 1) 전체 개수를 센다 → 분모.   단계 2) 조건에 맞는 개수를 센다 → 분자.   단계 3) 분자/분모 형태로 적는다. 예: 8 꽃 중 5 빨강 → 1) 분모 8, 2) 분자 5, 3) 5/8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 여집합 — 빨강이 3/8이면 빨강 아닌 것은?
learn.content: 한 부분의 분수를 알면 나머지(여집합)는 1에서 뺀 값. 예: 빨강 = 3/8 → 빨강 아닌 것 = 8/8 − 3/8 = 5/8. 예: 좋아함 = 2/6 → 안 좋아함 = 4/6. 🔍 빠른 검산: 두 분수 합이 1 (b/b)인가?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 검증 — 분자 ≤ 분모 항상 성립
learn.content: 그룹 분수에서 분자는 분모를 넘을 수 없음 (전체보다 부분이 많을 수 없음).   분자 < 분모 → 일부 (예: 3/8)   분자 = 분모 → 전체 (예: 8/8 = 1)   분자 > 분모 → 그룹 분수에서는 불가능. 예: 5개 사탕 중 7개가 빨강? 불가능. 🔍 검산: 분자가 분모 이하인지 확인.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.7 'Fractions of a Group' pp.337-340
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic E — Equivalent Fractions
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015
